func main() {
	daemon.InitDaemon("npc", common.GetRunPath(), common.GetTmpPath())
	logs.SetLogger("store")
	application := app.New()
	window := application.NewWindow("Npc " + version.VERSION)
	window.SetContent(WidgetScreen())
	window.Resize(fyne.NewSize(910, 350))

	window.ShowAndRun()

}
